usage: Early architecture Standortbestimmung and blind-spot discovery.
Validation of earlier model and architecture decisions.
Pre-release state check for runtime, public surface, and release readiness.

what: Project-memory consistency and open-work closure triage.
usage: Project-memory steering-model consistency check; produced the open-findings closure triage whose strictly evidenced canonical edits were applied.
related_refs: project_memory consistency follow-up; applied triage edits to findings.json and ftrs.json

what: Adversarial architecture/model review of the domain-contract registry and metadata complexity.
usage: Tests whether registries/domain_contracts constrains transformation semantics and metadata growth; found broken checker/promote loop, requirement/transformation conflation, and prose-field risks; proposes minimum registry model, invariants, and next slices.

what: Read-only review of consumer pipeline operability and maintainer autonomy across real consumer repos and in-repo dogfood consumers.
usage: Tests whether a human maintainer can understand, adjust, and operate consumer pipelines without AI; inventories pipelines and plugins fleet-wide; identifies duplicated validate_references rule blocks as primary friction and proposes the narrow rules_path shared-ruleset slice.

what: Read-only architecture review of the domain-intent vs render/adapter/parser boundary and persisted-vs-derived meta ahead of the planned meta simplification.
usage: Tests both boundary directions (domain must not emit backend render commands; render/adapter/parser must not infer domain truth from carrier artifacts); finds the boundary mostly clean with guard-test coverage; classifies all meta roots; concludes no adapter action is needed before meta simplification and proposes a parser canonical-write allowlist guard as the first slice.
